name: @comfyorg/fbx-exporter-three
description: FBX exporter for three.js scenes — Blender-parity binary FBX writer with full skinning, animation, morph targets, lights, cameras and texture embedding.

scripts.test: node --import tsx test/m1-binary-layer.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m1-fbxloader-binary.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m1-deep-audit.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m2-integration.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m2-deep-audit.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m3-mesh-roundtrip.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m3-edge-cases.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m3-deep-audit.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m3-multiuv.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m5-skinning.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m5-deep-audit.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m5-bindpose-recovery.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m6-animation.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m6-deep-audit.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m7-morph.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m7-deep-audit.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m8-light-camera.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m8-deep-audit.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m9-texture.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m9-deep-audit.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m4-axis-units.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m4-deep-audit.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m4-light-camera-direction.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/oracle-blender-cube.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/oracle-blender-skinned.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/m9-slot-roundtrip.test.mjs && node --import tsx test/options.test.mjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test
